per_outcome.operationalization: Self-reported time in minutes for ideation, outlining, drafting, and editing phases combined
7-point Likert scale rating of story effectiveness in conveying ideas creatively, interestingly, coherently, with good writing
7-point Likert scale rating of story originality including themes, plot, setting, structure, ending, and style
7-point Likert scale rating of story's ability to engage readers through literary devices and vivid imagery
7-point Likert scale rating of language clarity, comprehensibility, grammar, punctuation, and spelling
7-point Likert scale rating of story organization and structure
Survey ratings of process flexibility, goal achievement effectiveness, willingness to reuse, and overall satisfaction with writing process and AI assistance
Average number of genres per story, measuring variety in story types produced
Similarity score (0-1 scale) measuring genre overlap between AI-supported stories across participants
Similarity score (0-1 scale) measuring aggregate content overlap between stories across participants
